items.question: How does AlgoPronos AI work?
items.answer: Our platform uses Claude Sonnet 4.5, one of the most advanced AIs in the world, to analyze hundreds of matches in real time. The AI takes into account statistics, team form, head-to-head history, referees and much more to generate optimized combines.

items.question: Is the free VIP for life really free?
items.answer: Yes, absolutely! By creating a 1xBet account with our exclusive promo code, you automatically get free VIP access for life on AlgoPronos AI. No payment is required, now or ever.

items.question: How long does VIP verification take?
items.answer: Verification is usually completed within 24 hours. Once approved, your VIP access is activated instantly and forever.

items.question: Can I use AlgoPronos AI on mobile?
items.answer: Yes, our platform is fully responsive and works perfectly on all devices: smartphone, tablet and computer.

items.question: What is the success rate of combines?
items.answer: Our average success rate is 78.5% over the last 6 months. We regularly publish our statistics in full transparency.

items.question: How does the Premium subscription work?
items.answer: The Premium subscription costs 1000 FCFA per week and gives unlimited access to all features. Payment is made via FedaPay (Mobile Money, bank card). There is no commitment.

vip.title: Free AlgoPronos AI VIP for life

verificationTime.question: How long does verification take?
verificationTime.answer: Usually within 24 hours. We manually verify each request to ensure security.

depositRequired.question: Do I need to deposit money on 1xBet?
depositRequired.answer: No, just creating the account is enough to get AlgoPronos VIP access. But thanks to our promo code, if you deposit, you automatically get a 200% BONUS up to 250,000 FCFA on your 1st deposit!

reallyFree.question: Is VIP really free for life?
reallyFree.answer: Yes! Once activated, you have unlimited access forever, without any recurring payment.

premiumAndVip.question: Can I have Premium AND VIP?
premiumAndVip.answer: No need! VIP gives you exactly the same unlimited access as Premium, for free.

promoCode.title: 1xBet Promo Code Management
promoCode.pattern: 8-20 characters, uppercase letters and numbers only
promoCode.warning: Warning: After changing the code, also update it in your 1xBet affiliate dashboard so new signups are tracked.
